meta_title: For Freelancers: SaaS pricing to Solve can't monetize skills (Beginner Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to SaaS pricing and overcome can't monetize skills. A Beginner-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: SaaS Pricing to Solve Monetization Issues
content.seo_description: Stop trading time for money. Learn how to implement scalable SaaS pricing models using Antigravity and Claude Code to finally monetize your development skills.
content.answer_block: The root cause of monetization failure is value-based misalignment. By shifting from hourly billing to a tiered subscription model, you capture recurring revenue. Use Antigravity to scaffold your billing infrastructure and Claude Code to automate Stripe integration, turning stagnant technical skills into a high-margin, automated SaaS revenue engine.
content.intro:
You’ve spent years mastering the stack, yet your bank account remains stuck in the 'hourly rate' trap. Every line of code you write for a client is a one-time transaction—a digital commodity that depreciates the moment the project closes. The industry calls it 'job security,' but you know the truth: it's a ceiling that prevents you from scaling.

It is time to pivot from being a service provider to a product owner. By implementing a robust SaaS pricing strategy, you stop selling time and start selling outcomes. This tutorial bridges the gap between raw code and recurring revenue, leveraging modern AI tooling to build enterprise-grade billing systems in a fraction of the time.

steps.title: Define Your Value Tiers
steps.description: Before writing code, map your features to three price points: Starter (acquisition), Pro (value), and Enterprise (customization).
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a schema for a SaaS pricing model with three tiers: Starter, Pro, and Enterprise. Include Stripe plan IDs, feature limits, and metadata for rate limiting.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Generate a pricing-tiers.json file based on the Antigravity schema.'

steps.title: Bootstrap the Billing Architecture
steps.description: Use Antigravity to generate the boilerplate for Stripe Webhooks, ensuring your backend handles subscription status updates autonomously.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a Node.js Express route to handle Stripe webhooks for 'customer.subscription.updated'. Include logic to update user database status.
steps.claude_code_command: claude add --file src/routes/webhooks.js --content 'implement stripe webhook verification'

steps.title: Automate Subscription Logic
steps.description: Use Claude Code to integrate the Stripe SDK into your existing app architecture, creating a seamless checkout flow.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Provide a clean function to create a Stripe Checkout session based on a provided price ID and user email.
steps.claude_code_command: claude terminal --command 'npm install stripe && claude write src/services/stripe.js'

steps.title: Implement Feature Gating
steps.description: Protect your application features using middleware that checks the user's current subscription tier against the required tier.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a middleware function 'checkSubscription(tier)' that queries the database and blocks access if the user's plan is insufficient.

steps.title: Deploy and Monitor
steps.description: Finalize your production environment and set up logging to track churn and upgrade events.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a dashboard query to calculate MRR (Monthly Recurring Revenue) from the subscription collection.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Set up monitoring for Stripe events and deploy to production environment.'

pro_tips: Always offer an annual plan at a 20% discount to boost immediate cash flow and reduce churn.
Use 'Feature Flags' instead of hard-coding tiers so you can pivot pricing without redeploying your entire stack.
Integrate a 'Free Trial' period to lower the barrier to entry, but require a credit card upfront to improve lead quality.
Implement 'Usage-Based' add-ons for your Enterprise tier to capture upside as your clients grow.
Never build your own billing engine; use Stripe's pre-built checkout UI to maintain PCI compliance and save 40+ hours of dev time.
content.next_steps: Once your billing is live, focus on building a 'Lead-to-Revenue' funnel by connecting your Stripe events to an email automation tool like Resend or Postmark.
content.conversion_block: Stop building for free and start capturing the value you create. Our community provides the templates, the AI workflows, and the mentorship to help you ship your first profitable SaaS. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.

Use Antigravity to generate the boilerplate for Stripe Webhooks, ensuring your backend handles subscription status updates autonomously.
Use Claude Code to integrate the Stripe SDK into your existing app architecture, creating a seamless checkout flow.
Protect your application features using middleware that checks the user's current subscription tier against the required tier.
Finalize your production environment and set up logging to track churn and upgrade events.
